# go-musicfox
> go-musicfox 是用 Go 编写的终端（TUI）音乐播放器，基于网易云音乐。多引擎播放、桌面歌词、DLNA 投送、MPRIS 控制，支持 macOS / Linux / Windows 全平台。

## About
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/go-musicfox/go-musicfox): Source code, issues, releases
- [Official Website](https://musicfox.anhoder.com): Project introduction and installation guide
- [Changelog](https://github.com/go-musicfox/go-musicfox/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [README](https://github.com/go-musicfox/go-musicfox#readme): Full documentation
- [License: MIT](https://github.com/go-musicfox/go-musicfox/blob/main/LICENSE)

## Key Facts
- Written in Go, powered by bubbletea TUI framework
- Supports 6 playback engines: Beep, MPV, MPD, DLNA, AVFoundation (macOS), MediaPlayer (Windows)
- 8 audio quality levels from standard to premium Hi-Res
- 40+ customizable keyboard shortcuts with Vim-style navigation
- Available via 15+ package managers: Homebrew, AUR, Copr, Nix, Scoop, Flatpak, etc.
- Open source under MIT License, started in 2021, 2000+ commits
